blended.narrative: Devil's Head is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 15 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,632 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Wednesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
